message:
feat(fp-frame): add corrwith_axis and map_with_default

- DataFrame.corrwith_axis(other, axis): axis=0 for column-wise
  correlation (same as corrwith), axis=1 for row-wise correlation
  across shared numeric columns
- Series.map_with_default(mapping, default): map values using lookup
  table with a custom default for unmapped keys instead of NaN

3 new tests, 851 total.
